name: @clientpad/server
description: Fetch-standard ClientPad public API server for PostgreSQL-backed apps.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @clientpad/core build && pnpm --filter @clientpad/whatsapp build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @clientpad/core build && pnpm --filter @clientpad/whatsapp build && npm run build && node test/server.test.mjs
